title: Revenue%20Management%20System%20White%20paper
content:
REVENUE ACA
REVENUE MANAGEMENT SIMPLIFIEDWHITE PAPER


Domestic revenue mobilization is essential for supporting poverty reduction by increasing the government’s ability to self-finance
public investments, and recurrent expenditures including the social sectors. Hence, all Governments are making rational and concerted
efforts to increase their domestic revenue mobilization activities and achieve higher growth rates in GDP . 
The overarching rationale for this intervention is thus fourfold:
• Increased growth rates are needed to help drive job creation, revenue mobilization, and public service delivery;
• Increased domestic revenue mobilization through tax and public private partnerships is required to support growth;
Techno Brain has developed its own intuitive and robust Revenue Management System (RevenueACA) that is designed and adopted 
according to the regional administration of governance, prevalent across the Eastern, Southern and Western Africa regions.
The Revenue Management Systems’ robust reporting capabilities ensure that the local government units will fully benefit from
analysing the revenue data and making informed and timely decisions
It is evident that every Local/National council or state has a vision to offer its residents and businesses, quality and reliable
infrastructure, services and facilities and also is mandated to make policy and decisions on local governance and development. 
To aid its services delivery, collection of revenue from multiple sources is required e.g. market fees, property rates and so on. However, a
number of challenges exist within revenue collection and accounting process as follows;
• Lack of an up to date business register
• Lack of verified updated property and land register roll
• Inability to tag and identify tax rate payers who owe the local government
• No clear billboards and advertisement inventory
• Manual procedures in collection of revenues
• Lack of visibility of deposits/collections done at the bank/financial institutions
• Delays in reconciliation of collections against revenue sources and rate payers
• Inability to have real-time management dashboards, analysis and reports
• Low collections and visibility of revenue collector’s performanceINTRODUCTION

PROPOSED SOLUTION
Our web based Revenue Collection & Management solution 
(RenenueACA) encompasses the whole revenue cycle from col -
lection, management and reporting with business intelligence ca -
pabilities while supporting integration to Geographic Information 
Systems (GIS).
Our solution aims at providing convenient payment channels for 
citizens and thus increase efficiency and effectiveness of the rev -
enue collection processes.
The various collection channels as outlined below will be custom -
ized and made available:
• Mobile Collections (Mobile Banking App, Quick Response Codes 
and mobile Money Wallets)
• Point of Sale Terminals
• Online payments
• Bank Branches
• Agency Banking
The robust reporting capabilities of our solution will further ensure 
that you will fully benefit from analyzing the revenue data on real 
time basis thus making informed and timely decisions. In addition, 
our Revenue Collection and Management Solution contains com -
prehensive security and audit trail functions that will manage the 
access of users in the system

Platform agnostic and web-based, the system has several deployment models (on premise and cloud ready) that take into consideration 
client preferences, legacy system investments as well as other enterprise intricacies.
All the above channels offer real time rev -
enue remittance across its different pay -
ment collection points. 
The RevenueACA system is already built 
with a management database that also 
enables billing, Taxpayer records mainte -
nance and unlimited revenue sources.• Revenue Mapping (Inventory)- integra -

With RevenueACA, a number of integrations and system components that will enable the desired outcome of en -
hanced revenue collection.
These include:
• Integration to modern Payment PlatfoRevenueACA 
• Implementation of the Revenue and Citizen Portal 
• Implementation and GIS Solution along the Property and Revenue modules 
• Deployment of Business Intelligence and Reporting Tools
• Integrating the solution to an existing ERP
Multiple commercial banks now have the latest technology in the electronic payments space in Africa and partner -
ing with the banks to channel revenue collected at various sources while simplifying the experience for the modern 
taxpayer is key. Using electronic payments is a sure way to curb pilferage in the collections process and also ensures 
closer monitoring of collections in real time. 
The Citizen Portal module will ensure taxpayers conveniently access various services. Among the benefits here will 
be increased transparency with users also able to privately view their accounts, perform transactions and subse -
quently a higher compliance in payments, permit renewals and increased confidence in local governments.
GIS will be used to capture revenue source 
features that are on the ground and display 
this information on a map. This informa -
tion displayed on the map will have access 
to the related financial information of the 
revenue sources, tagged to it enabling the 
administration make quick decisions on 
where to focus their resources on enforce -
ment and services provision.


The reporting dashboard will allow the ad -
ministration to view up to the minute sta -
tistics such as;• Collections Today
• Collections this Month
• Number of Property Renewals Due
• Property Renewals Overdue
• Overdue by Revenue Category
• Revenue Budget against actual collec -
tions
• Revenue collected per zone/area/market• Debtors aging reports
• Customer reports
• Transaction reports
• Revenue Collection reports
• Revenue Summary reports
• Revenue Forecast reports
• Reconciliation (Cash/Bank) reports
• System Audit reports
COUNTY GOVERNMENT OF KENYA

analysis, presentation and sharing among other required personnel.
